reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar tiene servicio de comida restaurante libre toda la noche . Cuentan con agua caliente sin cargo.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place with free restaurant service all night. Hot water is provided free of charge.

reviews.comment:
Debería enlazar dato, que sin tener carnet de socio encima, con el número de documento hacer descuento en consumo por condición de socio

(Translated by Google)
It should link data that, without having a membership card on hand, allows for a discount on consumption based on membership status, using the document number.

reviews.comment:
Mi calificación es solo por el personal que despacha combustible. Lugar de paso en la ruta, personal que despacha combustible muy atento, y amable.
Personal dentro del local poco amable,  tuvimos que buscar las mesas  y sillas  para sentarnos en el deck

(Translated by Google)
My rating is solely for the fueling staff. A great stopover on the route, the fueling staff were very attentive and friendly.
The staff inside the restaurant were unfriendly; we had to find tables and chairs to sit on the deck.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1103205321495883631/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURsME9fQ3JRRRAB
